isValidPassword(String) - Method in interface io.github.fontysvenlo.ais.businesslogic.api.ValidatorInterface
Validates if a password meets the required criteria: - minimum length of 8 characters - contain at least one digit - contain at least one uppercase letter - contain at least one lowercase letter - contain at least one special character: @#$%^&+=!
isValidPhoneNumber(String) - Method in interface io.github.fontysvenlo.ais.businesslogic.api.ValidatorInterface
Validates the given phone number.
